title: The Just King's Decree
description: A wise king named Aryan solves a difficult dispute between two women by testing their true love.

scenes.title: The Decree
scenes.text: In a kingdom where truth was the highest law, King Aryan faced a difficult choice. Two women claimed the same child.
scenes.imagePrompt: A noble king with a grey beard sitting on a high throne, two women standing before him, one looking desperate, the other greedy, medieval court

scenes.title: The Test
scenes.text: 'Split the child in two,' the King said calmly. One woman stayed silent, while the other fell to her knees, crying for mercy.
scenes.imagePrompt: The King raising a hand in judgment, a guardsman standing near, one woman weeping on the floor while the other watches coldly

scenes.title: Selfless Love
scenes.text: 'Give the child to her!' the crying woman yelled. 'I would rather lose my child than see him harmed.'
scenes.imagePrompt: Close up of an emotional mother's face with tears, pleading with her hands outstretched towards the king

scenes.title: Justice Served
scenes.text: The King smiled. 'Only a true mother would give up her child to save him.' Justice was done, and the kingdom rejoiced.
scenes.imagePrompt: The mother hugging her baby tightly, the king smiling warmly from his throne, glowing light through stained glass windows

title: Queen Elara's Secret
description: The Queen discovers a hidden garden that only blooms when the kingdom is at peace.

scenes.title: The Hidden Wall
scenes.text: Beneath the palace walls, Queen Elara found a door covered in thick ivy. It hadn't been opened for a hundred years.
scenes.imagePrompt: Queen Elara in a royal gown, clearing vines from an old stone door at the base of a castle wall, mystery atmosphere

scenes.title: The Bloom
scenes.text: As she stepped inside, the silver moonflowers began to glow. They only opened their petals when the heart was light.
scenes.imagePrompt: A secret garden with glowing blue and silver flowers, a stone fountain in the center, sparks of magic in the air

scenes.title: The Message
scenes.text: Inside, a message was carved in stone: 'Peace is the garden where hope grows.' Elara knew she had to share this with her people.
scenes.imagePrompt: Close up of a stone tablet with elegant carvings, surrounded by glowing petals and soft light

scenes.title: The Kingdom Blooms
scenes.text: By sharing the garden's secret, the Queen brought the whole kingdom together. Unity became their greatest strength.
scenes.imagePrompt: A grand celebration in the palace courtyard, people holding jars of glowing plants, happiness and light

title: The Last Dragon
description: An unlikely hero finds the last dragon egg in a hidden cave and must protect it from those who want its power.

scenes.title: The Cave
scenes.text: Kael was a simple shepherd, but he followed a falling star into the Dragon's Maw cave. There, he found a pulsing purple egg.
scenes.imagePrompt: A young man in simple clothes holding a glowing purple egg inside a dark, rocky cave with stalactites

scenes.title: The Hatching
scenes.text: With a soft crack, a tiny creature with emerald eyes emerged. Kael name him Spark, the last of his kind.
scenes.imagePrompt: A small cute baby dragon with tiny wings peeking out of a broken purple shell, looking up at a surprised young man

scenes.title: The Flight
scenes.text: Years passed, and Spark grew strong. Together, they soared above the clouds, far away from the greedy hunters.
scenes.imagePrompt: A man riding a large green dragon through a golden sky with white fluffy clouds, high altitude adventure

scenes.title: A New Era
scenes.text: They found a hidden valley where dragons could once again thrive. Kael became the first Guardian of the Skies.
scenes.imagePrompt: A beautiful hidden valley with a waterfall, several dragons flying around, a peaceful sanctuary

title: Crystal Mountain
description: Quest to find the scattered pieces of the mountain that keeps the world afloat and the magic within.

scenes.title: The Split
scenes.text: Long ago, the Crystal Mountain was the heart of the world. But it shattered, and the world began to sink.
scenes.imagePrompt: A massive crystal mountain floating in a dark sky, pieces of it falling away into a mist below

scenes.title: The Call
scenes.text: A young girl named Lyra heard the crystal singing. She set out with only a lantern and a map showing the stars.
scenes.imagePrompt: A girl in a cloak walking through a misty forest, holding a lantern while looking at a scroll under moonlight

scenes.title: The Summit
scenes.text: The mountain was guarded by stone giants. Lyra didn't fight them; she sang the song of the mountain back to them.
scenes.imagePrompt: Large stone giants standing perfectly still on a snowy slope, a small girl standing before them peacefully

scenes.title: The Rebirth
scenes.text: As the pieces came together, the world floated high once more. The mountain was whole, and so was her heart.
scenes.imagePrompt: The crystal mountain glowing with brilliant white light, aurora borealis in the sky, epic peaceful resolution

title: Sorcerer's Apprentice
description: A young student learns that true magic comes from the heart, not just from old books and dusty scrolls.

scenes.title: The First Spell
scenes.text: Toby tried to make the brooms dance. He read the words correctly, but the magic was wild and messy.
scenes.imagePrompt: A young boy in a wizard robe, many brooms floating around a room haphazardly, spilled potion bottles, chaotic magic

scenes.title: The Master's Library
scenes.text: Master Eldon watched from the shadows. 'Magic follows your intent, Toby, not just your tongue.'
scenes.imagePrompt: An old wizard with a long white beard and starry hat, standing in a library filled with glowing books

scenes.title: The Pure Heart
scenes.text: When a small bird was hurt, Toby didn't look at a book. He reached out with love, and the magic worked perfectly.
scenes.imagePrompt: A boy gently holding a small bird, a soft blue light emanating from his palms, healing wings

scenes.title: A True Wizard
scenes.text: He realized that being a sorcerer wasn't about power, but about protection. He was an apprentice no more.
scenes.imagePrompt: The boy and the old wizard standing together on a balcony, casting a combined spell that creates fireworks

title: The Magic Inkwell
description: Everything written with this ink comes to life for exactly one hour, but it can't be used for greed.

scenes.title: The Bottle
scenes.text: In a box of antiques, Sarah found a bottle that smelled like wet earth and ozone. It was the Ink of Creation.
scenes.imagePrompt: A young woman opening a dusty wooden box, finding a small obsidian bottle with a glowing silver label

scenes.title: The Drawing
scenes.text: She drew a small paper boat. To her shock, it floated right off the page and began to sail in her glass of water.
scenes.imagePrompt: A small origami-style boat made of ink-marked paper, floating in a water glass, magical ripples

scenes.title: The Limit
scenes.text: A greedy merchant tried to draw a bag of gold, but the ink turned to dust. It only worked for things of beauty.
scenes.imagePrompt: A grumpy man looking at a pile of gray dust on a desk, a disappointed expression, dark atmosphere

scenes.title: One Hour of Joy
scenes.text: Sarah drew a field of butterflies for her sick grandmother. For one hour, the room was filled with dancing colors.
scenes.imagePrompt: An old woman smiling in bed, surrounded by many vibrant glowing butterflies, a very warm and joyful room

title: Two Friends and the Storm
description: Rohan and Aman learn the true meaning of friendship during a dangerous storm in the Himalayas.

scenes.title: The High Meadow
scenes.text: Rohan and Aman were grazing their sheep in the high meadow. The sky was as blue as a sapphire, and they were laughing.
scenes.imagePrompt: Two boys in traditional Himalayan clothes laughing in a green meadow with many sheep, snow capped mountains in background

scenes.title: The Dark Clouds
scenes.text: Without warning, the light vanished. A thunderhead as black as coal rolled over the peaks, bringing ice and wind.
scenes.imagePrompt: Massive dark scary clouds looming over a mountain ridge, wind blowing the grass and sheep running for cover

scenes.title: The Cave
scenes.text: Rohan's foot slipped on the wet rock, but Aman caught him. They huddled together in a small cave, sharing a single blanket.
scenes.imagePrompt: One boy holding the hand of another who is slipping on a rock cliff, rain and lightning everywhere

scenes.title: The Sunrise
scenes.text: The morning sun was warm and golden. They had survived together, and their bond was now as strong as the mountains themselves.
scenes.imagePrompt: Two friends walking down a mountain path in the morning sun, arms around each other's shoulders, peaceful and heroic

title: Sharing the Last Apple
description: In a time of scarcity, two rivals find common ground and discover that sharing makes a meal twice as full.

scenes.title: The Dry Land
scenes.text: A long drought had dried the river, and food was hard to find. Sam and Jack were both searching for anything to eat.
scenes.imagePrompt: A cracked dry earth landscape, two tired-looking boys walking along a dusty path, several abandoned buckets

scenes.title: The Discovery
scenes.text: They both spotted it at the same time: one small, bright red apple underneath a dead tree.
scenes.imagePrompt: A single red apple on the ground, two boys rushing towards it from different sides, hands almost touching it

scenes.title: The Split
scenes.text: Instead of fighting, Sam took a small knife and cut the apple exactly in half. He handed the bigger half to Jack.
scenes.imagePrompt: Hands of a boy cutting an apple in half on a flat stone, the other boy looking surprised and grateful

scenes.title: A New Friend
scenes.text: As they ate together, the first raindrop fell. Sharing the apple was the start of a friendship that would last a lifetime.
scenes.imagePrompt: Two boys laughing and eating apple slices, rain starting to fall on their faces, puddles forming

title: The Cookie Jar Mystery
description: Young Milo uses his magnifying glass to solve the case of the missing cookies.

scenes.title: The Empty Jar
scenes.text: Milo loved cookies, but someone else loved them more. The jar was empty, and there were crumbs on the floor.
scenes.imagePrompt: A boy looking disappointed at an empty cookie jar on a table, cookie crumbs trail leading to another room

scenes.title: Detective Work
scenes.text: With his magnifying glass, he found a long blue hair. Milo knew exactly who had a blue coat.
scenes.imagePrompt: A close up of a magnifying glass showing a blue cat hair on a wooden floor

scenes.title: The Suspect
scenes.text: Whiskers the Cat was sleeping under the couch. She looked very satisfied, and there was a bit of frosting on her nose.
scenes.imagePrompt: A blue cat sleeping under a couch with some white frosting on its chin, looking very happy

scenes.title: Sharing is Fun
scenes.text: Instead of being mad, Milo shared a glass of milk. Next time, they decided to bake together.
scenes.imagePrompt: A boy and a blue cat sharing a small snack together, both of them looking very happy

title: The Flying Cardboard Box
description: A child's imagination turns a simple cardboard box into a spaceship for an epic adventure through the living room.

scenes.title: The Launchpad
scenes.text: Leo found a big cardboard box. It wasn't just a box; it was the fastest spaceship in the galaxy!
scenes.imagePrompt: A child drawing controls inside a large cardboard box, surrounded by toys, in a living room

scenes.title: Through the Stars
scenes.text: Zoom! He flew past the sofa-mountains and the lamp-stars, heading for the kitchen-planet.
scenes.imagePrompt: A child in a cardboard box spaceship 'flying' through a living room, blurred background to show speed

scenes.title: Alien Encounter
scenes.text: On the kitchen-planet, he met a friendly alien (his cat, Mittens) who wanted to share his space-milk.
scenes.imagePrompt: A child in a cardboard box spaceship offering a bowl of milk to a cat wearing a tin foil hat

scenes.title: Home Sweet Home
scenes.text: After a long journey, Leo landed his spaceship safely back in his room, ready for his next adventure.
scenes.imagePrompt: A child sleeping soundly in bed, the cardboard box spaceship parked neatly beside it, stars drawn on the box

title: The Moon's Night Light
description: A little girl asks the moon to stay so she doesn't feel alone at night.

scenes.title: The Fear of Dark
scenes.text: Lilly didn't like the shadows on her wall. She whispered to the moon, 'Please don't go away.'
scenes.imagePrompt: A girl in bed looking at shadows on the wall that look like scary trees, moonlight shining through the glass

scenes.title: The Moon's Promise
scenes.text: The moon sent a beam of silver light that turned her teddy bear into a knight made of stardust.
scenes.imagePrompt: A teddy bear glowing with silver starlight, sitting upright on a bed, protective stance

scenes.title: Dreamland Gate
scenes.text: With the star-knight by her side, Lilly drifted into a world where everything was made of fluff and soft light.
scenes.imagePrompt: A girl sleeping peacefully, her room turning into a clouds and soft light, many stars

scenes.title: Morning Sun
scenes.text: Lilly woke up feeling brave. She knew that even when the moon sleeps, the light is always there.
scenes.imagePrompt: A girl sitting up in bed with the morning sun hitting her face, a huge smile, her teddy bear is normal again

title: Counting Star Sheep
description: Counting magical star-sheep to fall into a deep and peaceful slumber.

scenes.title: The First Sheep
scenes.text: In the valley of dreams, the first sheep stepped across the moon. She was soft and white as a summer cloud.
scenes.imagePrompt: A fluffy white sheep jumping over a fence made of starlight in a purple night sky

scenes.title: Two and Three
scenes.text: They weren't just sheep. They were the keepers of the deep sleep, and they brought pillows and soft blankets.
scenes.imagePrompt: Three sheep walking on a cloud, several pillows made of starlight floating around them

scenes.title: The Final Count
scenes.text: As the tenth sheep jumped, the child's eyes became heavy. Ten is the number of the deepest rest.
scenes.imagePrompt: A long line of sheep in the sky, a bedroom window below with a sleeping child, very serene

scenes.title: Deep Dream
scenes.text: The sheep settled into the stars. The counting was over, and the adventure of dreaming had begun.
scenes.imagePrompt: A child dreaming of flying on a sheep's back, a world of colors and stars

title: Honest Woodcutter
description: A poor woodcutter is rewarded for his honesty by a river fairy after he refuses to take axes that don't belong to him.

scenes.title: The Big Mistake
scenes.text: Oh no! Hari's old iron axe slipped from his hand and fell into the deep, dark river. He was so poor he couldn't afford a new one.
scenes.imagePrompt: A man in simple clothes looking worried at the edge of a river, bubbles in the water as an axe sinks

scenes.title: The Fairy
scenes.text: The river began to glow. A beautiful water fairy appeared, holding up a golden axe. 'Is this yours?' she asked.
scenes.imagePrompt: A glowing water fairy rising from a river holding a shining golden axe, the man looking surprised

scenes.title: The Choice
scenes.text: Hari shook his head. 'No, that is too fine for a man like me.' She then showed him a silver one, but he said no again.
scenes.imagePrompt: The man being shown a silver axe, he is gesturing 'no' with his hands, honest expression

scenes.title: Honesty Rewarded
scenes.text: Finally, she showed him his old iron axe. 'That's it!' he cried. The fairy was so happy she gave him all three axes.
scenes.imagePrompt: The fairy handing the man three axes (gold, silver, iron), he is bowing in gratitude, bright forest light

title: The Boy who Cried Wolf
description: The classic tale of why telling the truth is important for trust and how a boy learned it the hard way.

scenes.title: Boredom
scenes.text: Bored on the hill, Sam decided to play a trick. 'Wolf! Wolf!' he yelled, and all the villagers ran up to help.
scenes.imagePrompt: A boy on a green hill cupping his hands and shouting, villagers in the distance running towards him

scenes.title: The Second Trick
scenes.text: He did it again the next day. The villagers were angry, but Sam just laughed at his cleverness.
scenes.imagePrompt: A boy laughing on a hill as frustrated villagers walk back down, a group of sheep nearby

scenes.title: The Real Wolf
scenes.text: Then, a giant shadow moved in the trees. A real wolf was there! Sam yelled for help, but no one came.
scenes.imagePrompt: A large gray wolf with glowing eyes peeking out from bushes, the boy looking terrified and shouting

scenes.title: Restoring Trust
scenes.text: He lost his sheep that day. He learned that no one believes a liar, even when he's telling the truth.
scenes.imagePrompt: The boy sitting alone on a hill in the sunset, a sad expression, empty paths below

title: The Clever Rabbit
description: Intelligence overcomes strength when a clever rabbit outsmarts a fierce lion who thought he was the master of all.

scenes.title: The King's Hunger
scenes.text: Leo the Lion ate an animal every day. The forest was scared. The animals met to find a better way.
scenes.imagePrompt: A large fierce lion sitting on a rock in the jungle, small animals hiding behind trees, dark atmosphere

scenes.title: The Rabbit's Turn
scenes.text: It was the rabbit's turn to be eaten. He arrived late and told the Lion, 'A bigger King lion stopped me!'
scenes.imagePrompt: A small rabbit standing in front of a giant lion, looking brave but small, lush jungle background

scenes.title: The Well
scenes.text: The rabbit led the Lion to a deep well. 'He is inside!' the rabbit said. The Lion saw his own face and jumped in to fight.
scenes.imagePrompt: The lion looking into a round stone well, his reflection visible, the rabbit pointing towards the water

scenes.title: Victory
scenes.text: With the Lion gone, the forest was safe. Always remember: wit is stronger than claws.
scenes.imagePrompt: All the animals (deer, monkeys, parrots) celebrating in a clearing, the rabbit on a small raised rock

title: Brave Little Lion cub
description: A cub learns that courage isn't the absence of fear, but acting despite it for those we love.

scenes.title: The Fearful Cub
scenes.text: Simba was afraid of everything—even the long grass. He hid behind his mother always.
scenes.imagePrompt: A small lion cub cowering behind a large lioness's legs in the tall savanna grass

scenes.title: The Lost Friend
scenes.text: A baby zebra got stuck in a mud pit. Simba heard the cries. No one else was there to help.
scenes.imagePrompt: A small zebra cub sinking into a pit of gray mud, looking very scared

scenes.title: Stepping Up
scenes.text: Simba's legs shook, but he walked onto the logs and pulled the zebra's neck with all his cub strength.
scenes.imagePrompt: The lion cub pulling a zebra cub by the mane using his mouth, a very determined and brave expression

scenes.title: The Real King
scenes.text: He saved his friend. Simba learned that true power isn't about the size of your roar, but the size of your heart.
scenes.imagePrompt: The two cubs sitting together in the sunset, Simbe looking tall and proud, beautiful savanna view

title: Princess and the Garden
description: Princess Elina discovers that true beauty and magic come from a kind heart and the way she treats her subjects.

scenes.title: The Gray Palace
scenes.text: Elina lived in a palace made of cold, gray stone. It had many jewels, but no flowers and no laughter.
scenes.imagePrompt: A large stone castle on a hill, a young woman looking out from a window, empty courtyard

scenes.title: The Seeds
scenes.text: She found a bag of old seeds in the cellar. She decided to plant them herself, getting her fine hands dirty.
scenes.imagePrompt: A princess in a blue dress kneeling on the ground, digging a small hole, a bag of seeds next to her

scenes.title: The Bloom
scenes.text: As the flowers grew, so did the happiness of the castle. The stone walls began to glow with light and color.
scenes.imagePrompt: A vibrant garden with many types of flowers, vines growing up the castle walls, butterfly magic

scenes.title: The New Queen
scenes.text: She learned that the best kingdoms are built from the ground up, with love and a bit of hard work.
scenes.imagePrompt: The princess standing in her garden, people from the village joining her, a very bright and happy ending

title: Princess and the Pea
description: A classic test of character that reveals a true royal spirit after a very restless night on twenty mattresses.

scenes.title: The Rainy Night
scenes.text: A knock came at the castle door in the middle of a storm. A girl stood there, soaking wet, claiming to be a princess.
scenes.imagePrompt: A girl with messy hair and a wet dress at a large castle door, rain and lightning, palace guards

scenes.title: The Bed
scenes.text: The Queen placed a single green pea under twenty mattresses. 'If she's a real princess, she'll feel it,' she thought.
scenes.imagePrompt: A tall bed with many colorful mattresses, an old queen hiding a small pea at the very bottom

scenes.title: Restless Sleep
scenes.text: The girl couldn't sleep. Every time she moved, she felt like she was lying on a mountain of stone.
scenes.imagePrompt: A girl sitting up in a giant bed, looking tired and rubbing her back, moonlight from the window

scenes.title: Recognition
scenes.text: 'I didn't sleep a wink!' she said at breakfast. Only a true princess could be so sensitive. The prince had found his bride.
scenes.imagePrompt: The prince and girl shaking hands at a breakfast table, the queen smiling in the background

title: Ganesha's Wisdom
description: How the elephant-headed god learned that circling his parents was the same as circling the whole world.

scenes.title: The Race
scenes.text: Shiva and Parvati had a race for their sons. 'Whoever circles the world first wins this magical fruit!'
scenes.imagePrompt: A divine couple sitting on a high mountain throne, two sons standing before them, a golden fruit in the center

scenes.title: Kartikeya's Flight
scenes.text: Kartikeya jumped on his peacock and flew around the oceans, mountains, and lands as fast as he could.
scenes.imagePrompt: A young warrior on a peacock flying over the sea and mountains, sunset sky

scenes.title: The Real World
scenes.text: Ganesha didn't have a peacock. He had a small mouse. He walked around his parents three times.
scenes.imagePrompt: Lord Ganesha in orange robes walking around a seated couple, his mouse following him closely

scenes.title: The Fruit of Love
scenes.text: 'My parents ARE my world,' he said. Shiva smiled and gave him the fruit. Wisdom is greater than speed.
scenes.imagePrompt: The couple handing Lord Ganesha a glowing golden fruit, happiness and light within a divine palace

title: Krishna and the Flute
description: The song of Krishna's flute charms all of nature, bringing a moment of pure bliss to the cows and the clouds.

scenes.title: The Evening Bank
scenes.text: By the river Yamuna, young Krishna sat on the soft grass. The birds were silent, waiting for his first note.
scenes.imagePrompt: A blue-skinned boy with a crown of peacock feathers, sitting under a large ancient tree, a river in the background

scenes.title: The Music
scenes.text: As the flute touched his lips, a melody of pure joy filled the air. The cows stopped grazing to listen.
scenes.imagePrompt: Lord Krishna playing a golden flute, several cows and calves looking at him with peaceful eyes

scenes.title: Dancing Peacock
scenes.text: Even the peacocks began to dance! The rhythm of the flute was the heartbeat of the whole universe.
scenes.imagePrompt: A peacock with a grand open tail dancing in a lush garden, the music notes glowing in the air

scenes.title: Eternal Peace
scenes.text: The music reminded every living being that the divine is always with us, in the sound of a song or a breeze.
scenes.imagePrompt: Lord Krishna surrounded by many animals and children, everyone looking completely happy and at peace

title: The Proud Peacock
description: A beautiful bird learns that while his feathers are grand, his voice isn't the most important gift he has to offer.

scenes.title: The Mirror
scenes.text: Percy the Peacock loved his reflection. 'I'm the most beautiful bird in the world!' he would shout.
scenes.imagePrompt: A peacock looking at himself in a forest puddle, his tail spread out in all colors

scenes.title: The Song Contest
scenes.text: The Nightingale sang a song that made the trees cry with joy. Percy tried to sing, but out came a harsh squawk.
scenes.imagePrompt: A tiny brown nightingale singing on a branch, the peacock looking frustrated with an open beak

scenes.title: The Lesson
scenes.text: The Owl told him: 'Beauty is for the eyes, but character is for the ears of the universe.'
scenes.imagePrompt: An owl on a branch looking down at a peacock with its tail closed, thoughtful atmosphere

scenes.title: Inner Beauty
scenes.text: Percy stopped boasting. He used his large feathers to shade the smaller birds from the sun. He was finally happy.
scenes.imagePrompt: The peacock with his tail spread over a group of small birds, providing shade in a sunny sunny field

title: Eagle's High Flight
description: Learning to see the big picture from above the clouds and the courage it takes to leave the nest.

scenes.title: The Cliff Edge
scenes.text: Eddie the Eagle was afraid to jump. The wind was fast, and the rocks below were very sharp and hard.
scenes.imagePrompt: A young eagle sitting at the edge of a high rocky cliff, looking down with a nervous expression

scenes.title: The First Wingbeat
scenes.text: His father pushed him! Seconds before he hit the ground, Eddie opened his wings and felt the air carry him up.
scenes.imagePrompt: The eagle diving down, wings starting to open, a massive canyon below

scenes.title: Above the Storm
scenes.text: He flew higher than anyone. He saw the whole river, the whole forest, and the whole world in one glance.
scenes.imagePrompt: The eagle flying through a white cloud, looking down on a miniature world of green and blue

scenes.title: Master of Sky
scenes.text: He realized that the only thing holding him back was his own fear. Now, the sky was his true home.
scenes.imagePrompt: The eagle soaring toward the sun, silhouette against a bright sky, pure freedom

title: The Magical Forest
description: Discover a place where nature itself tells tales of the old world and every tree has a heartbeat.

scenes.title: The First Step
scenes.text: The air was filled with the sound of wind chimes. But there were no chimes—only the leaves of the Crystal Wood.
scenes.imagePrompt: A forest with translucent glass-like leaves, a young explorer touching a tree trunk that is glowing

scenes.title: The Drinking Pool
scenes.text: The animals here didn't drink water, they drank light from the silver pond that sat in the forest's heart.
scenes.imagePrompt: A fox and a deer drinking from a pool of glowing white liquid, stars reflected on the surface

scenes.title: The Elder Tree
scenes.text: At the center was the Tree of Time. Its rings told the story of every star that had ever fallen to earth.
scenes.imagePrompt: A massive tree with a face carved in the bark, its roots glowing with ancient energy

scenes.title: Always Green
scenes.text: The forest never died. It only changed colors, reflecting the dreams of those who wandered through it.
scenes.imagePrompt: A wide shot of a rainbow-colored forest under a double moon sky, incredibly magical and colorful

title: Singing River's Secret
description: If you listen closely, the water tells where it has been and the future it plans to bring.

scenes.title: The Source
scenes.text: High in the mountains, a small stream began with a giggle. It was the only river in the world that could sing.
scenes.imagePrompt: A small waterfall coming out of a cave on a snowy mountain, musical notes in the spray

scenes.title: The Chorus
scenes.text: As it grew, the river added more voices. The rocks were its drums, and the fish were its backup singers.
scenes.imagePrompt: A wide river with many rocks, fish jumping out of the water, a very lively and rhythmic scene

scenes.title: The Warning
scenes.text: One day, the river took on a dark, low note. It was warning the village of the coming flood from the melted snow.
scenes.imagePrompt: The river water turning dark and fast, people on the bank looking worried and listening

scenes.title: Peaceful Harmony
scenes.text: The village prepared, and no one was hurt. The river went back to its sweet lullaby, the most trusted friend of all.
scenes.imagePrompt: The river flowing through a peaceful village, sun reflecting on the water, people waving at the stream
